svg.title: LUNG1-001 lung segmentation overlay
svg.desc: Classical lung segmentation generated by medical-image-segmentation from axial DICOM slice 67 of NSCLC-Radiomics.
svg.text: NSCLC-Radiomics · axial slice 67 · deterministic HU + connected-components pipeline
Research demonstration · not for clinical use · doi:10.7937/K9/TCIA.2015.PF0M9REI
